tasks.label: Start Backend API
tasks.command: conda activate EncuestasBackendAzure && cd backend && uvicorn app:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000

tasks.label: Start Frontend Portal
tasks.command: conda activate EncuestasFrontendAzure && cd frontend && start http://127.0.0.1:5173 && npm run dev
